title: FAKE FIXTURE: Will Bitcoin be above $100,000 at 5 PM EDT on Jun 30, 2026?
settlement_rule_text: Fake fixture methodology text for parser testing only: CDNA U-BTC midpoint data from Lukka or ICE Cryptocurrency Data is aggregated by Blockstream and distributed by ICE Data Connectivity and Feeds. The settlement value uses a 60-second period immediately before the event time and requires at least 25 midpoint prices. This differs from Kalshi BRTI settlement.
void_or_cancellation_rules: Fake fixture void rule text for schema testing only.
